torch_pattern:
head_dim = qkv.shape[-1] // (num_q_heads + 2 * num_kv_heads)
# input: [batch, 1, seq_len, (num_q_heads + 2*num_kv_heads) * head_dim]  (from test: in0_shape = [batch, 1, seq_len, (num_q_heads + 2*num_kv_heads)*head_dim]; A = torch.randn(in0_shape))
q, k, v = torch.split(qkv, [num_q_heads * head_dim, num_kv_heads * head_dim, num_kv_heads * head_dim], dim=-1)
q = q.reshape(batch, seq_len, num_q_heads, head_dim).permute(0, 2, 1, 3)
k = k.reshape(batch, seq_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim).permute(0, 2, 1, 3)
if transpose_k_heads:
    k = k.transpose(-2, -1)
v = v.reshape(batch, seq_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim).permute(0, 2, 1, 3)
# outputs: q [batch, num_q_heads, seq_len, head_dim], k/v [batch, num_kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim]

config_template.notes: Set num_kv_heads=0 and pass the same tensor when splitting heads of a single (non-fused) Q, K, or V tensor; only first return value is valid. Optional second positional input tensor supplies KV separately (read_from_input_tensor_kv). Input must be rank-4 [B, 1, S, fused_dim] in TILE_LAYOUT; unsqueeze rank-3 inputs first.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: prefill, seq_len up to model max, [1, 1, S, (nq+2*nkv)*head_dim] fused input
placement_observations.source: llama/qwen attention prefill call sites: memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG
decode-path call sites: memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG (e.g. stable-diffusion fused-qkv branch, qwen decode interleaved branch)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode, batch rows = 32-tile aligned, fused_dim columns

placement_observations.source: falcon attention and qwen decode sharded-split branch

placement_observations.size_descriptor: sharded unit test, output shard spec == input shard spec, q padded_shape [seq_len, num_q_heads, batch, head_dim]

placement_observations.source: bert/whisper-style: query_key_value = ttnn.to_memory_config(query_key_value, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) immediately before split; outputs to DRAM

placement_observations.size_descriptor: long prefill, seq_len > MAX_QKV_MM_SEQ_LEN (input reshaped to [B, 1, S, -1] before split)
placement_observations.source: call site: if seq_len > MAX_QKV_MM_SEQ_LEN: qkv_fused = ttnn.reshape(qkv_fused, [batch_size, 1, seq_len, -1]) then split with memory_config=cfg.score_memcfg
